featured.title: VESPERA_SOLUTIONS
featured.verbo: ERP built during internship. Replaces 5+ disconnected tools with one system: sales, purchases, warehouse, treasury. Real-time stock tracking, AI-powered insights, Telegram bot for instant KPI checks.

projects.title: VALAQUIA_STORE
projects.verbo: Full-stack game store. Android client + Spring Boot REST API. Game catalog, health tips per game, SHA-256 secure downloads.

projects.title: BOOK_AND_BUGS
projects.verbo: Library management in 2 versions. PHP MVC web + JavaFX desktop. User auth, CRUD, connection pooling with DBCP2, consistent JSON contract.

projects.title: DIY_TOOLS
projects.verbo: Inventory + order management for DIY tools shop. Customer-facing ordering, admin fulfillment, stock tracking.

projects.title: ECODRIVE_ADV
projects.verbo: EV discovery platform with integrated MOVES plan guidance. Helps customers make informed decisions and plan EV purchases.

about.bio_1: I build multiplatform systems that turn complex problems into clean, working solutions. From ERP backends to Android apps to AI agent pipelines — I architect with the conviction that great software starts with great foundations: typed contracts, deterministic behavior, and obsessive attention to detail.
about.bio_2: I work at the intersection of traditional engineering and AI-augmented development. Claude Code, OpenCode, MCP — these aren't buzzwords, they're my daily toolkit. I orchestrate agents (Hermes Agent, n8n), enforce SDD/TDD discipline, and ship systems that teams can actually maintain.
